system.description: Some death gods are loving. Some are hateful. They each have a place for us all.
system.title: God of Death

scriptures.name: Level 1: The Skeletons
scriptures.description: For every success, summon one stop-motion skeleton or similar bone-construct per level in this god. All their stats are 2, and they have Health 2, Guard 0 and Defence 0. They follow your orders, but are otherwise non-sentient. Casting the Scripture again will destroy all skeletons from a previous casting.

scriptures.name: Level 2: The Reaper
scriptures.description: Summon a weapon of bone and death. Decide its look. Choose whether it attacks in melee (with either Str or Dex) or ranged (with Dex, Int or Wis). Gain Advantage on all attacks with this weapon and on any attempts to intimidate living beings.

specials.name: If Wounds, heal 1 Health to any target

scriptures.name: Level 3: The Bell Tolls
scriptures.description: Requires a bell or similar object. When rung, roll a Wis dice pool and use it to attack everyone within earshot except the Godbinder.
